title: 2026 H1 投资标的复盘
summary: 研报中心 19 个当前标的的半年度事后复盘：AI 基础设施关键瓶颈判断准确，算力（AMD +159%）、HBM 内存（SK hynix +250%）、分布式电力（Bloom +123%）全部大涨；但回报极度右偏（均值约 +32% vs 中位数约 +3.5%），且对赢家普遍因「估值已计入」维持中性。Salesforce 是方向性高信心失误，Netflix/WBD 是叙事性失误；H2 需要补 NVIDIA、电力基础设施和自定义 ASIC。
summaryEn: Semi-annual post-hoc review of 19 current research-center names: the AI-infrastructure bottleneck call was right — compute (AMD +159%), HBM memory (SK hynix +250%) and distributed power (Bloom +123%) all ran — but returns were heavily right-skewed (mean ~+32% vs median ~+3.5%) and winners were held neutral on valuation. Salesforce was the directional high-conviction miss; Netflix/WBD was the narrative miss. H2 should add NVIDIA, power infrastructure and custom ASICs.
